name: Australian Cross Bull
description: A healthy Australian cross bull with strong build and good meat quality. Well-fed and ideal for Qurbani. Properly vaccinated and maintained in a hygienic environment.

name: Black Bangle Goat
description: Premium Black Bengal goat known for its tender meat and high demand during Qurbani. Active, healthy, and raised with natural feed.

name: Brahman Cross Bull
description: Large Brahman cross bull with excellent body weight and strong physique. Perfect for large Qurbani shares. Well cared for, disease-free, and properly nourished.

name: Desi Sheep
description: Locally raised desi sheep with good health and clean feeding habits. Suitable for small family Qurbani. Maintained in a natural rural environment.
